nodes.context: One of the largest immigrant street gangs in Denmark, active in Denmark and Sweden, involved in drug trafficking, robbery, theft, racketeering, extortion and murder.
Youth gang controlled by Black Cobra.
Traditional Danish biker gang, rival of Black Cobra.
Motorcycle gang, rival of Black Cobra.
Gang associated with Black Cobra in Denmark.
Danish gang, rival of Black Cobra.
Youth gang of Hells Angels, rival of Black Cobra.
Immigrant gang involved in conflict with Hells Angels.
Immigrant gang involved in conflict with Hells Angels.
Bandidos support club, involved in conflict with Black Cobra.

edges.evidence_quote: The Black Cobra gang also control a youth gang called the Black Scorpions.
edges.context: Black Cobra controls the Black Scorpions youth gang.

edges.evidence_quote: The Black Cobra gang's main rival is the Hells Angels, as in 2007 there was a rise in gang warfare between the two gangs, stemming from conflict over control of the drug and prostitution trade.
edges.context: Black Cobra and Hells Angels are rivals engaged in gang warfare over drug and prostitution trade.

edges.evidence_quote: A war between the Black Cobra and Bandidos erupted in Køge after Oruc Türkoglu, a leading Black Cobra figure in the city, was stabbed and wounded on 29 January 2013.
edges.context: Black Cobra and Bandidos were in a war in 2013, later ended by a truce.

edges.evidence_quote: The Black Cobra gang has been associated with gangs such as the Black Scorpions and Black Army within Denmark
edges.context: Black Cobra is associated with Black Army.

edges.evidence_quote: The Black Cobra gang has been associated with gangs such as the Black Scorpions and Black Army within Denmark, and have seen to have rivalry with Danish gangs such as the Hells Angels and Bandidos motorcycle gangs, and the Vaerebros.
edges.context: Black Cobra has rivalry with Vaerebros.

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: AK81 , X-Team , Bandidos , Chicanos , Hells Angels
edges.context: Black Cobra lists AK81 as a rival in the infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: AK81 , X-Team , Bandidos , Chicanos , Hells Angels
edges.context: Black Cobra lists X-Team as a rival in the infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: In Sweden, the Black Cobra became involved in a conflict with the Chicanos , a Bandidos support club, after the Chicanos attempted to recruit Black Cobra members.
edges.context: Black Cobra and Chicanos were in conflict in Sweden in 2013.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Black Army , Black Scorpions , M16 , Black Ghost , Black Spider , Black Jackets
edges.context: Black Cobra lists M16 as an ally in the infobox.

edges.context: Black Cobra lists Black Ghost as an ally in the infobox.
